heroTitle: Award-Winning Critical Care, Pulmonary and Sleep Specialists
heroSubtitle: Board-certified physicians providing advanced, collaborative care for complex lung conditions, sleep disorders, and critical care needs.
servicesSubtitle: Comprehensive care across multiple specialties, delivered by board-certified physicians with decades of experience.

services.title: Critical Care
services.description: Comprehensive intensive care for complex medical conditions

services.title: Pulmonary Services
services.description: Expert diagnosis and treatment of lung diseases

services.title: Interventional Pulmonary
services.description: Advanced procedures for complex pulmonary conditions

services.title: Sleep Medicine
services.description: Specialized care for sleep disorders and related conditions

services.title: Neurocritical Care
services.description: Specialized critical care for neurological conditions

services.title: Clinical Research
services.description: Partnering with Avacare Research to advance patient care through clinical trials

teamSectionText: Our team of board-certified physicians brings decades of combined experience in critical care, pulmonary medicine, sleep disorders, and interventional procedures. We believe in collaborative care, working closely with you and your family to develop personalized treatment plans.
teamHighlights: Collaborative approach involving you in every decision
Coordinated care with your primary physician
appointmentSubtitle: We make it easy to get the care you need. Choose the scheduling option that works best for you.
telehealthTitle: Telehealth Visits from the Comfort of Home
telehealthText: Experience the same quality care you'd receive in-person, but from wherever you are. Our secure telehealth platform makes it easy to consult with our specialists.
testimonialsSubtitle: Trusted by patients and physicians throughout Colorado

testimonials.quote: The care provided by the team at CCPSA was nothing short of exceptional. From the moment I walked in, I felt heard and supported. The doctors and staff were not only highly skilled but also deeply compassionate.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: I have had the pleasure of working with several of the physicians at Critical Care Pulmonary and Sleep Associates over the past decade. Their clinical expertise is top-notch, and they consistently go above and beyond for their patients.
testimonials.author: Dr. James R.

testimonials.quote: After struggling with sleep issues for years, I finally found answers at CCPSA. The sleep medicine team was thorough, patient, and genuinely interested in improving my quality of life.
testimonials.author: Michael T.

affiliationsSubtitle: Proudly affiliated with leading healthcare systems and recognized for excellence in patient care.
ctaText: Our team is here to help. Reach out today and take the first step toward better health.

quickAccessCards.description: Access records, results, communicate with care team
quickAccessCards.title: Patient Portal

quickAccessSubtitle: Manage your care with just a few clicks
